instruction: It’s given that $1 \text{pound (lb)}=16 \text{ounces (oz)}$. A baker owns a small business. He produces bread in bags. Each bag needs $3.04$ oz of dough. The baker purchased $11.4$ lb of dough. How many bags of bread can be produced? Solution: The baker can produce [ANS] bags of bread with $11.4$ lb of dough.
